title: 13 Viewing Live Rates in Wires
body_text:
13	Viewing Live Rates in Wires
13.1	Viewing Live Rates in Wires
The Rates page displays a snapshot of live foreign exchange rates in effect at the time you view the rates. Exchange rates change frequently and move according to the market. All Wires Users can view live rates.
Note: 	Rates include your foreign exchange spread (if applicable).
To view live rates:
Log in to Wires as described in Chapter 10, Logging in to Wires.
Select
View Rates
. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Select âView Ratesâ
View the Rates page. See Figure 2.
â
Select the Refresh icon to refresh the rates.
â
Select the CSV icon to download a CSV file of the rates.
Figure 2: Viewing the Rates Page
Note:	Rates arenât live on Saturday, they are held from Friday through to Sunday.
